case_title: ARTHUR S. LEAL VS. EULOGIO B. RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-24-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR S. LEAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EULOGIO B. RODIRGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-24-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEAL, ARTHUR S. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, EULOGIO B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF SEP-08-2021. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
